releaseNotes:
v0.22.1 - Alex feedback + sync hardening:

- Expiration fields now accept short dates like 1/2/27 as well as 1/2/2027.

- Manual entry puts expiration near the top for faster entry.

- Drug-name fields are easier to edit without accidental text highlighting.

- Print label now has clear Print and Share PDF buttons.

- The reported code 4098502287200030 is captured as a raw product code instead of dead-ending as unknown.

- Sync setup codes now expire safely and enrolled devices can generate a fresh code when adding another device.

- Server sync hardening: safer pagination, stricter No-PHI payload validation, revoked-device roster filtering, and setup-code throttling.
